name: kata-flight
description: Kata Flight — skill-driven kata issue shipping with roborev review handling and optional RDR process binding.

interface.shortDescription: Ship kata issues through roborev-backed agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: Kata Flight packages kata and roborev workflow skills for resolving, reviewing, landing, and batching tracked issues, with optional binding to an external RDR process.
defaultPrompt: Set up Kata Flight for this project.
